zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Shute於大約1577年出生在英國坎布利其爾歐艾金頓時，她的父親Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench57歲，母親Thomasine Burgoyne54歲。她於1610年與John Leete of Dodington在英國英格蘭薩默塞特多丁頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1650年之後在英國英格蘭薩默塞特多丁頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Shute于大约1577年出生在英国坎布利其爾歐艾金頓时，她的父亲Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench57岁，母亲Thomasine Burgoyne54岁。她于1610年与John Leete of Dodington在英国英格兰薩默塞特多丁頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1650年之后在英国英格兰薩默塞特多丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: Shute
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from any of several places called with Middle English shute, Old English scīete ‘projecting piece of land’ (often in the corner of a parish), in particular those in Devon, which include Shute near Axminster, Shute in Kelly, Shute in Ugborough, Shute in Shobrooke, Shute Farm in Bishopsteignton, and Shewte in Bovey Tracy. Other sources of the surname may include Shute Farm in Longbridge Deverill and Shute Farm in Donhead Saint Mary (both Wiltshire).
In some cases also an Americanized form of Croatian and Slovenian Šute, and probably also of its cognate Šutej (see Shutey ). Compare Shutte and Schutte .

variants.name: Shutes
meanings: English: variant of Shute , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Shutt
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English schut(te), schit(te) ‘archer’ (Old English scytta, a derivative of scēotan ‘to shoot’). Compare Shutter .
Americanized form of German   Schutt   or   Schott  .

variants.name: Shutey
meanings: Americanized form of Croatian and Slovenian Šutej: nickname derived from Croatian (and possibly also Slovenian dialect) šut ‘without horns/ears’, also ‘mutilated, lame’, or perhaps from a derivative of Croatian šutjeti ‘to be silent’, Slovenian dialect šut(l)ati ‘to work silently’. Compare Shute and Schutte .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Shute was born about 1577, in Oakington, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench, was 57 and her mother, Thomasine Burgoyne, was 54. She married John Leete of Dodington in 1610, in Dodington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1650, in Dodington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Shute est née environ 1577, à Oakington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Thomasine Burgoyne, avait 54 ans. Elle a épousé John Leete of Dodington en 1610, à Dodington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1650, à Dodington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1610 in Dodington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom John Leete of Dodington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Morì dopo il 1650, nel Dodington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Shuteが約1577年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアオアキントンで生まれた時，父Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Benchは57歳，母Thomasine Burgoyneは54歳であった。1610年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトドディントンでJohn Leete of Dodingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1650年以後にイギリスイギリスソメルセトドディントンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Shute(이)가 대략 1577년 영국 캄브리지실르 킨그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Thomasine Burgoyne(은)는 54세였다. 그녀는 1610년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 도딩턴에서 John Leete of Dodington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1650년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 도딩턴에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Shute родилась около 1577 г. в местности оакингтон, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Thomasine Burgoyne, 54. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Leete of Dodington в 1610 г. в местности додингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1650 г. в местности додингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
